name: VedantFlow
title: AI Security Researcher
summary: AI Security Specialist with hands-on experience in web application security and emerging expertise in AI/ML security testing. Completed intensive 480+ hour AI Security specialization covering adversarial ML, LLM security, prompt injection, privacy attacks, and production ML security. Proven track record in vulnerability discovery through bug bounty programs and security assessments. Passionate about securing AI systems against evolving threats and bridges the gap between traditional cybersecurity and the future of AI.

experience.title: Computer Security Specialist
achievements: Conducted web application security assessments identifying 15+ critical vulnerabilities.
Developed automated scanning scripts reducing assessment time by 40%.

experience.title: Independent Security Researcher
achievements: Participated in HackerOne, Bugcrowd, and Synack bug bounty programs.
Discovered and disclosed 15+ valid vulnerabilities in authentication and access control systems.

projects.name: Adversarial ML Suite
